  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)

    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2, b3
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b4, b5, b6, b7
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)

    (on b19 b18)

    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5, b6 (height 2, b5 on table, b6 on b5)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)

  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b4-b5-b6 (b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on top)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 3): b7-b8-b9 (b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on top)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 3): b10-b11-b12 (b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on top)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 3): b13-b14-b15 (b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on top)
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on table, now on top of something or still alone)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on top
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on top
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b12 on table, b11 on b12, b10 on top
      (on-table b12)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Tower 7 inverted: b15 on table, b14 on b15, b13 on top
      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (clear b13)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b5, b6, b7 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b8, b9, b10 (b8 on table, b9 on b8, b10 on b9)
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 8): b11, b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b4, b3, b2 (b4 on table, b3 on b4, b2 on b3)
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b7, b6, b5 (b7 on table, b6 on b7, b5 on b6)
      (on-table b7)

      (on b5 b6)

      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (clear b11)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end

  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4, b5, b6 (height 3, b4 on bottom)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b7, b8, b9, b10 (height 4, b7 on bottom)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)

    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 still on table (height 1, no change)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 still on table (height 1, no change)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)

      (on b7 b8)

      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (clear b11)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2, b3 (b2 on table, b3 on b2)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4, b5 (b4 on table, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b6, b7, b8 (b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b9, b10, b11, b12 (b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11)
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 4): b13, b14, b15, b16 (b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15)
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (originally on bottom)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (originally on bottom)
      (on b2 b3)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top (originally on bottom)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on-table b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on top (originally on bottom)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on-table b8)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b9 on top (originally on bottom)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on-table b12)
      (clear b9)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b13 on top (originally on bottom)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on-table b16)
      (clear b13)
      
      ;; Arm empty at end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 7): b5, b6, b7, b8, b9, b10, b11 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, ..., b11 on b10)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 7): b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18 (b12 on table, b13 on b12, ..., b18 on b17)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still on table, it's a single block)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b4 on table, b3 on b4, b2 on b3
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b11 on table, b10 on b11, ..., b5 on b6
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b18 on table, b17 on b18, ..., b12 on b13
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
